3096710.name: Aetheria: Whispers of the Forest Moon
3096710.description:
Whispers of the Forest Moon is a story-driven action-adventure where three warriors set out to discover why their kingdom has fallen into a realm of darkness. The demo gives an introduction to the main modes, both 2d, top-down exploration, dialog screens, and a test battle sequence. Seeing this demo shows in essence what gameplay would be available,

Gameplay 

Explore mystical forests, battle corrupted beasts, and unravel secrets hidden beneath the moonlit canopy. Players will switch between, eventually when released, three unique heroes, each with their own fighting style and abilities, as they progress through immersive environments and uncover the lore of the Moon Kingdom.

Features:

  • Play as two distinct characters, each with unique skills

  • Turn based combat with vintage stylings

  • Explore lush forests, caves, and ancient ruins

  • Atmospheric soundtrack and handcrafted art style

  • Narrative-driven progression with lore discoveries
3096710.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
